questionText: Select the name of the standard, protocol, or methodology you have used to collect activity data and calculate emissions.
questionKo: Scope 1 & 2 & 3 배출량 데이터를 수집 및 산정에 이용한 기준, 프로토콜, 방법론의 명칭을 입력하십시오.
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: CDP data users need to understand what methods have been used to calculate emissions.

guidance.text:
General 
There are a variety of standards, methodologies, and protocols available for collecting and reporting GHG data, but the large majority of companies refer to the GHG Protocol.
The appropriateness of an emissions calculation methodology should be determined on a case-by-case basis, and it is good practice for the methods used to estimate emissions and the underlying data to be externally verified.
CDP makes no judgments on standards, protocols or methodologies applied by companies to produce their inventories. However, we expect that any tool used will follow the best practice and observe important aspects such as the accuracy and completeness principles of standards similar to the GHG Protocol. CDP encourages companies to use the GHG Protocol Standards when national standards are not specified, including both the Corporate Standard and the Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard.
If the metholology(ies) you have used is not listed, select "Other, please specify;" and indicate the methodology(ies) used.
guidance.textKo: 일반 There are a variety of 기준, methodologies, 및 protocols available for collecting 및 reporting GHG data, but the large majority of companies refer to the GHG Protocol. The appropriateness of an emissions 계산 방법론 해야 합니다 be determined on a case-by-case basis, 및 it is good practice 에 대한 methods used to estimate emissions 및 the underlying data to be externally verified. CDP makes no judgments on 기준, protocols 또는 methodologies applied by companies to produce their inventories. However, we expect that 하나 이상 tool used will follow the best practice 및 observe important aspects such as the accuracy 및 completeness principles of 기준 similar to the GHG Protocol. CDP encourages companies to use the GHG Protocol 기준 경우 national 기준 are not specified, 포함 both the Corporate Standard 및 the Corporate 가치사슬 (Scope 3) Standard. 만약 the metholology(ies) you have used is not listed, select "Other, 직접 입력;" 및 indicate the 방법론(ies) used.
